---
title: "\'The Light of the Sun\'"
---

## \'The Light of the Sun\'

**Author:** Christabel Coleridge
**Date:** 1873
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (Christmas 1873), 100-110.

### Notes

This story subsequently appeared in Coleridge\'s [[otherbook:437]<i>The Face of Carlyon and Other Stories</i>].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
